hooks.command:
PLUGIN_DATA="${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_DATA:-${HOME}/.codebuddy/plugins/data/qqbot-channel-qqbot-channel-codebuddy}" && if [ -n "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_appId:-}" ] && [ -n "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_clientSecret:-}" ]; then mkdir -p "${PLUGIN_DATA}" && cat > "${PLUGIN_DATA}/config.yaml" <<YAML
qqbot:
  appId: "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_appId}"
  clientSecret: "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_clientSecret}"
  enabled: true
  name: "My QQ Bot"
  systemPrompt: "You are a helpful assistant."
  dmPolicy: "open"
YAML
echo "QQ Bot config written to ${PLUGIN_DATA}/config.yaml"; else echo 'Warning: QQ Bot credentials not configured. Run: codebuddy plugin enable qqbot-channel' >&2; echo 'Or run: bash ${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/setup.sh' >&2; fi
